expectedIssues: Sports icon is missing the the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The 'SCROLL DOWN' button overlay is positioned directly on top of the legal disclaimer/fine print text at the bottom of the page, making portions of the required legal text unreadable and cut off on both sides.

The legal disclaimer/fine print text is extremely small (appears to be around 7-8px equivalent) and uses low contrast gray text on a light background, making it nearly impossible to read, especially on mobile screens.
The fine print text container appears to have inconsistent left and right padding, causing the text to appear cramped and clipped at the edges of the screen.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a missing sports icon in the bottom navigation bar; all reported issues concern legal disclaimer text visibility and styling problems.
